creator: kew@timesink.spk.wa.us
text:
xdvi package is empty.

Fix: 

Repackage xdvi
How-To-Repeat: 
	/cdrom/packages# tar tzvf xdvi.tgz
	drwxr-xr-x root/bin          0 Nov 22 21:10 1994 ./
	-rw-rw-r-- root/bin         61 Nov 22 21:10 1994 +COMMENT
	-rw-rw-r-- root/bin        580 Nov 22 21:10 1994 +DESC
	-rw-rw-r-- root/bin        135 Nov 22 21:10 1994 +CONTENTS
	/cdrom/packages#
